title: verbascum leucophyllum
intro: Verbascum leucophyllum, also known as Silverleaf or Texas Sage, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and clusters of white, bell-shaped flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Verbascum leucophyllum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Verbascum leucophyllum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
